nasb.text: To you it was shown that you might know that the Lord, He is God; there is no other besides Him.

esv.text: To you it was shown, that you might know that the Lord is God; there is no other besides him.

cnv.text: 這是要顯明給你看，使你知道，只有耶和華是　神；除了他以外，再沒有別的神。

ccb.text: 耶和华行这样的事，是要叫你们知道祂是上帝，除祂以外，别无他神。
